001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.io.*;
026import java.time.*;
027import java.time.Duration;
028import java.time.temporal.*;
029import java.util.*;
030
031import javax.xml.datatype.*;
032
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
039
040/**
041 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link CsvSerializer}.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 */
048@SuppressWarnings({
049   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
050   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., ARG_ctx)
051   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for doSerialize, formatForCsvCell
052   "java:S6541", // Brain method acceptable for doSerialize, formatForCsvCell
053   "resource"   // Internal helpers return Closeables wired into pipe lifecycle; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
054})
055public class CsvSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
056
057   // Property name constants
058   private static final String PROP_byteArrayFormat = "byteArrayFormat";
059   private static final String PROP_allowNestedStructures = "allowNestedStructures";
060   private static final String PROP_nullValue = "nullValue";
061   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_byteArrayFormat = "CsvSerializerSession.byteArrayFormat";
062   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_allowNestedStructures = "CsvSerializerSession.allowNestedStructures";
063   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_nullValue = "CsvSerializerSession.nullValue";
064
065   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
066   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
067
068   private final CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat;
069   private final boolean allowNestedStructures;
070   private final String nullValue;
071
072   /**
073    * Builder class.
074    */
075   @SuppressWarnings({
076      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for builder hierarchy
077   })
078   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
079
080      private CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat;
081      private boolean allowNestedStructures;
082      private String nullValue;
083
084      /**
085       * Constructor
086       *
087       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
088       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
089       */
090      protected Builder(CsvSerializer ctx) {
091         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
092         byteArrayFormat = ctx.getByteArrayFormat();
093         allowNestedStructures = ctx.isAllowNestedStructures();
094         nullValue = ctx.getNullValue();
095      }
096
097      /**
098       * Allow nested structures.
099       *
100       * @param value The new value for this property.
101       * @return This object.
102       */
103      public Builder allowNestedStructures(boolean value) {
104         allowNestedStructures = value;
105         return this;
106      }
107
108      @Override
109      public CsvSerializerSession build() {
110         return new CsvSerializerSession(this);
111      }
112
113      /**
114       * Byte array format.
115       *
116       * @param value The new value for this property.
117       * @return This object.
118       */
119      public Builder byteArrayFormat(CsvByteArrayCellFormat value) {
120         if (nn(value))
121            byteArrayFormat = value;
122         return this;
123      }
124
125      /**
126       * Null value string.
127       *
128       * @param value The new value for this property. Can be <jk>null</jk> (resets to default).
129       * @return This object.
130       */
131      public Builder nullValue(String value) {
132         nullValue = value;
133         return this;
134      }
135
136      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
137      public Builder property(String key, Object value) {
138         if (key == null) {
139            super.property(key, value);
140            return this;
141         }
142         switch (key) {
143            case PROP_byteArrayFormat, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_byteArrayFormat:
144               return byteArrayFormat(cvt(value, CsvByteArrayCellFormat.class));
145            case PROP_allowNestedStructures, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_allowNestedStructures:
146               return allowNestedStructures(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
147            case PROP_nullValue, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_nullValue:
148               return nullValue(cvt(value, String.class));
149            default:
150               super.property(key, value);
151               return this;
152         }
153      }
154
155   }
156
157   /**
158    * Creates a new builder for this object.
159    *
160    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
161    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
162    * @return A new builder.
163    */
164   public static Builder create(CsvSerializer ctx) {
165      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
166   }
167
168   /**
169    * Constructor.
170    *
171    * @param builder The builder for this object.
172    */
173   protected CsvSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
174      super(builder);
175      byteArrayFormat = builder.byteArrayFormat;
176      allowNestedStructures = builder.allowNestedStructures;
177      nullValue = builder.nullValue != null ? builder.nullValue : "<NULL>";
178   }
179
180   @Override /* RecordWritable */
181   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
182      return RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(this, output);
183   }
184
185   @Override /* RecordWritable */
186   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
187      return false;
188   }
189
190   /**
191    * Applies any registered object swap to the specified value.
192    *
193    * <p>
194    * If a swap is registered for the value's type, the value is transformed using the swap's
195    * {@code swap()} method before being serialized.
196    *
197    * @param value The value to potentially swap.
198    * @param type The class metadata of the value's type.
199    * @return The swapped value, or the original value if no swap is registered.
200    */
201   @SuppressWarnings({
202      "rawtypes" // Raw types necessary for ObjectSwap handling
203   })
204   private Object applySwap(Object value, ClassMeta<?> type) {
205      try {
206         if (value == null || type == null)
207            return value;
208
209         ObjectSwap swap = type.getSwap(this);
210         if (nn(swap)) {
211            return swap(swap, value);
212         }
213         if (type.isDate())
214            return serializeDate((Date)value, type);
215         if (type.isCalendar())
216            return serializeCalendar(value, type);
217         if (type.isTemporal())
218            return serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)value, type);
219         if (type.isDuration())
220            return serializeDuration((Duration)value);
221         if (type.isPeriod())
222            return serializePeriod((Period)value);
223         return value;
224      } catch (SerializeException e) {
225         throw rex(e);
226      }
227   }
228
229   @SuppressWarnings({
230      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
231      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
232   })
233   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
234   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe pipe, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
235      var cm = push2("root", o, getClassMetaForObject(o));
236      if (cm == null)
237         return;
238      try {
239         try (var w = getCsvWriter(pipe)) {
240            Collection<?> l = null;
241            if (cm.isArray()) {
242            // Primitive arrays and byte[] serialize as single row (value = [1;2;3] or base64)
243            if (o.getClass().getComponentType().isPrimitive())
244               l = Collections.singletonList(o);
245            else
246               l = l((Object[])o);
247         } else if (cm.isCollection()) {
248            l = (Collection<?>)o;
249         } else if (cm.isStreamable()) {
250            // CSV must inspect first element for column headers, so materialization is unavoidable.
251            l = toListFromStreamable(o, cm);
252         } else {
253            l = Collections.singleton(o);
254         }
255
256         if (ne(l)) {
257            var firstOpt = first(l);
258            if (!firstOpt.isPresent())
259               return;
260
261            // Apply any registered swap to the first element to determine column structure.
262            var firstRaw = firstOpt.get();
263            var firstEntry = applySwap(firstRaw, getClassMetaForObject(firstRaw));
264            var entryType = getClassMetaForObject(firstEntry);
265            // If swapped type is not a bean (e.g. interface proxy), use raw type for strategy
266            if (! entryType.isBean() && firstRaw != null) {
267               var rawType = getClassMetaForObject(firstRaw);
268               if (rawType.isBean())
269                  entryType = rawType;
270            }
271
272            // Expected type for each element (for type discriminator)
273            var eType = cm.isArray() || cm.isCollection() || cm.isStreamable()
274               ? cm.getElementType()
275               : getExpectedRootType(firstRaw);
276
277            // CSV is flat; when addBeanTypes or addRootType is set, add _type column to all rows
278            var addTypeColumn = isAddBeanTypes() || isAddRootType();
279            var typeColName = addTypeColumn ? getBeanTypePropertyName(entryType) : null;
280
281            // Determine the best representation strategy.
282            // Use the BeanMeta from the entry type for bean serialization.
283            var bm = entryType.isBean() ? entryType.getBeanMeta() : null;
284
285            if (bm != null) {
286               // Bean or DynaBean path: header row = property names + optional _type
287               var addComma = Flag.create();
288               bm.getProperties().values().stream().filter(BeanPropertyMeta::canRead).forEach(x -> {
289                  addComma.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
290                  w.writeEntry(x.getName());
291               });
292               // Always append _type when addBeanTypes or addRootType to support polymorphic parsing
293               if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
294                  w.w(',');
295                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
296               }
297               w.append('\n');
298               var readableProps = bm.getProperties().values().stream().filter(BeanPropertyMeta::canRead).toList();
299               l.forEach(x -> {
300                  var addComma2 = Flag.create();
301                  if (x == null) {
302                     // Null entry: write null marker for each column
303                     readableProps.forEach(y -> {
304                        addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
305                        w.writeEntry(nullValue);
306                     });
307                     if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
308                        w.w(',');
309                        w.writeEntry("");
310                     }
311                  } else {
312                     // Apply swap before extracting bean properties (e.g. surrogate swaps)
313                     var swapped = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
314                     var aType = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
315                     // When swap yields non-bean (e.g. String), use raw object for property extraction
316                     var objForBean = aType.isBean() ? swapped : x;
317                     BeanMap<?> bean = toBeanMap(objForBean);
318                     readableProps.forEach(y -> {
319                        addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
320                        var value = y.get(bean, y.getName());
321                        value = formatIfDateOrDuration(value);
322                        value = formatForCsvCell(value);
323                        // Use toString() to respect trimStrings setting on String values
324                        if (value instanceof String s) value = toString(s);
325                        w.writeEntry(value != null ? value : nullValue);
326                     });
327                     if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
328                        var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
329                        w.w(',');
330                        w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
331                     }
332                  }
333                  w.w('\n');
334               });
335            } else if (entryType.isMap()) {
336               // Map path: header row = map keys from the first entry + optional _type
337               var addComma = Flag.create();
338               var first = (Map) firstEntry;
339               first.keySet().forEach(x -> {
340                  addComma.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
341                  // Apply trimStrings to map keys as well
342                  Object keyVal;
343                  if (x == null)
344                     keyVal = nullValue;
345                  else if (x instanceof String s)
346                     keyVal = toString(s);
347                  else
348                     keyVal = x;
349                  w.writeEntry(keyVal);
350               });
351               if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
352                  w.w(',');
353                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
354               }
355               w.append('\n');
356               l.forEach(x -> {
357                  var addComma2 = Flag.create();
358                  var swapped = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
359                  var aType = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
360                  var map = (Map) swapped;
361                  map.values().forEach(y -> {
362                     addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
363                     var value = applySwap(y, getClassMetaForObject(y));
364                     value = formatForCsvCell(value);
365                     // Apply trimStrings to map values
366                     if (value instanceof String s) value = toString(s);
367                     w.writeEntry(value != null ? value : nullValue);
368                  });
369                  if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
370                     var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
371                     w.w(',');
372                     w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
373                  }
374                  w.w('\n');
375               });
376            } else {
377               // Simple value path: single "value" column + optional _type
378               w.writeEntry("value");
379               if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
380                  w.w(',');
381                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
382               }
383               w.append('\n');
384               l.forEach(x -> {
385                  var value = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
386                  value = formatForCsvCell(value);
387                  // Use toString() to respect trimStrings setting
388                  w.writeEntry(value != null ? toString(value) : nullValue);
389                  if (addTypeColumn && ne(typeColName)) {
390                     if (x != null) {
391                        var aType = getClassMetaForObject(x);
392                        var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
393                        w.w(',');
394                        w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
395                     } else {
396                        w.w(',');
397                        w.writeEntry("");
398                     }
399                  }
400                  w.w('\n');
401               });
402            }
403         }
404         }
405      } finally {
406         pop();
407      }
408   }
409
410
411   private Object formatIfDateOrDuration(Object value) {
412      if (value == null)
413         return null;
414      var cm = getClassMetaForObject(value);
415      if (value instanceof Date d)
416         return serializeDate(d, cm);
417      if (value instanceof Calendar || value instanceof javax.xml.datatype.XMLGregorianCalendar)
418         return serializeCalendar(value, cm);
419      if (value instanceof TemporalAccessor t)
420         return serializeTemporal(t, cm);
421      if (value instanceof Duration)
422         return value.toString();
423      return value;
424   }
425
426   /**
427    * Formats a value for a CSV cell, handling byte[], primitive arrays, and nested structures.
428    */
429   private Object formatForCsvCell(Object value) {
430      if (value == null)
431         return null;
432      if (allowNestedStructures) {
433         var type = getClassMetaForObject(value);
434         if (value instanceof Map || value instanceof Collection || value instanceof Object[]
435               || (type.isBean() && !(value instanceof Map)))
436            return new CsvCellSerializer(byteArrayFormat, nullValue).serialize(value, this);
437      }
438      if (value instanceof byte[] b) {
439         return byteArrayFormat == CsvByteArrayCellFormat.SEMICOLON_DELIMITED
440            ? formatByteArraySemicolon(b)
441            : base64Encode(b);
442      }
443      if (value instanceof int[] a) {
444         var sb = new StringBuilder();
445         sb.append('[');
446         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
447            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
448            sb.append(a[i]);
449         }
450         sb.append(']');
451         return sb.toString();
452      }
453      if (value instanceof long[] a) {
454         var sb = new StringBuilder();
455         sb.append('[');
456         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
457            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
458            sb.append(a[i]);
459         }
460         sb.append(']');
461         return sb.toString();
462      }
463      if (value instanceof double[] a) {
464         var sb = new StringBuilder();
465         sb.append('[');
466         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
467            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
468            sb.append(a[i]);
469         }
470         sb.append(']');
471         return sb.toString();
472      }
473      if (value instanceof float[] a) {
474         var sb = new StringBuilder();
475         sb.append('[');
476         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
477            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
478            sb.append(a[i]);
479         }
480         sb.append(']');
481         return sb.toString();
482      }
483      if (value instanceof short[] a) {
484         var sb = new StringBuilder();
485         sb.append('[');
486         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
487            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
488            sb.append(a[i]);
489         }
490         sb.append(']');
491         return sb.toString();
492      }
493      if (value instanceof boolean[] a) {
494         var sb = new StringBuilder();
495         sb.append('[');
496         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
497            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
498            sb.append(a[i]);
499         }
500         sb.append(']');
501         return sb.toString();
502      }
503      if (value instanceof char[] a) {
504         var sb = new StringBuilder();
505         sb.append('[');
506         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
507            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
508            sb.append((int) a[i]);
509         }
510         sb.append(']');
511         return sb.toString();
512      }
513      return value;
514   }
515
516   private static String formatByteArraySemicolon(byte[] b) {
517      var sb = new StringBuilder();
518      for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) {
519         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
520         sb.append(b[i] & 0xff);
521      }
522      return sb.toString();
523   }
524
525   /**
526    * Prepares a value for inline cell serialization (bean→Map, date format, etc.).
527    * Used by {@link CsvCellSerializer}.
528    */
529   Object prepareForInlineValue(Object value) {
530      if (value == null)
531         return null;
532      var swapped = applySwap(value, getClassMetaForObject(value));
533      var type = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
534      if (type.isBean() && !(swapped instanceof Map))
535         return toBeanMap(swapped);
536      if (swapped instanceof Date d)
537         return serializeDate(d, type);
538      if (swapped instanceof Calendar || swapped instanceof XMLGregorianCalendar)
539         return serializeCalendar(swapped, type);
540      if (swapped instanceof TemporalAccessor t)
541         return serializeTemporal(t, type);
542      if (swapped instanceof java.time.Duration)
543         return swapped.toString();
544      return swapped;
545   }
546
547   CsvWriter getCsvWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
548      var output = out.getRawOutput();
549      if (output instanceof CsvWriter output2)
550         return output2;
551      var w = new CsvWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), getQuoteChar(), isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
552      out.setWriter(w);
553      return w;
554   }
555}
